mapper.select:
/* 카드 상세 조회 library.selectCardDetail */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SRC_DOCS , A.SQL_CODE , A.CHART_CFG , A.QRY_RSLT , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.CARD_ID = #{cardId}

/* 보관된 카드 목록 조회 library.selectArchiveCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SRC_DOCS , A.SQL_CODE , A.CHART_CFG , A.QRY_RSLT , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ARCHIVE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.CREATE_DT DESC

/* 휴지통 카드 목록 조회 library.selectTrashCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SRC_DOCS , A.SQL_CODE , A.CHART_CFG , A.QRY_RSLT , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.CREATE_DT DESC
